title: GigastudiosMod
description: This mod adds the gigachad from the gigastudios organization into your game!
body:
Say hello to the gigastudios mod! Play like a chad.
This mod adds te gigachad block and the rare gigachad ore.
The ore can be mined and smelted into ChadVeryGangsta which can be used to create the best sword in the game! Its called the Chadsword.

To craft the normal gigacad item u need 

1X grey wool

1X black wool

1X White wool

in this order.
